# Showcase Fan-out Run F-06 — Summary

**Run:** `results/experiments/showcase-fanout/2026-06-12-F-06` · **Date:** 2026-06-12
**Sources:** `scorecard.json` (`showcase-fanout.scorecard.v1`), `metrics.json` (`m1-replay.metrics.v1`)

## Headline

| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| Pass rate | **32/32 (100%)**, 0 failed |
| Retries | 7 (7 items needed a 2nd attempt; all recovered) |
| Wall clock | **24.3 s** (transcript-timestamp fallback — see caveats) |
| Requests | 39 (32 items + 7 retries) |
| Tokens | 69,605 prompt + 8,525 completion = **78,130 total** |
| Cache tokens | 0 created / 0 read |
| Cloud cost | **$1.398** (supervisor only; worker cloud cost not recorded) |

## Retries

All 7 retried items passed on attempt 2; no timeouts and every worker exited 0.

- **5× `parameter_mention`** — first-attempt docstring omitted required parameter names: item-01 (`scrapy/http/cookies.py`, missing `request`), item-11 (`scrapy/commands/check.py`, missing `args`, `opts`), item-18 (`scrapy/core/downloader/contextfactory.py`, missing `method`, `args`, `kwargs`), item-24 (`scrapy/utils/_download_handlers.py`, missing `url`), item-27 (`scrapy/core/downloader/handlers/__init__.py`, missing `spider`).
- **2× `non_placeholder`** — first-attempt docstring too short or placeholder-like: item-13 (`scrapy/dupefilters.py`), item-26 (`scrapy/commands/shell.py`).

Retry attempts were generally faster than the first attempt (e.g. item-01: 9.4 s → 5.0 s).

## Throughput

- Peak single-request decode: **101.5 tok/s** (request 2)
- Peak aggregate decode over a 1 s window: **~511 tok/s** (derived by uniform completion-token spreading — approximate)
- Peak prefill: **~1,431 tok/s** (request 22)
- Per-request walls range 1.4–11.5 s; first wave of 9 concurrent requests landed at the same start timestamp, confirming fan-out parallelism.

## Instrumentation caveats

- **Wall clock is a last-resort estimate.** The 24.3 s figure comes from transcript request timestamps, which miss tool-execution time between requests. Treat as a lower bound.
- **Time accounting failed its sanity check** (`sanity_ok: false`). `t_api_wait` (153.3 s) is summed across concurrent requests, so it exceeds wall clock by design under parallelism; the residual is −139.8 s (~575% off the ≤2% rule). The per-bucket breakdown is not meaningful for this run.
- **No generation/thinking/prefill timings** were present in the OpenAI-compatible transcript; all per-request throughput numbers use the `usage_client_wall_fallback` source (token counts divided by client-observed wall time), so prefill/decode splits are approximate.
- **GPU energy unavailable** — `telemetry.csv` had fewer than two rows, so `gpu_wh` is null and the telemetry peak summary is empty.
- **Worker cloud cost is null**; the $1.398 total reflects supervisor-side cost only.
- **Zero cache tokens** reported — no prompt caching was in effect, so the prompt-token total (69.6k) is fully uncached spend.
